message:
fix(gen_server): suppress clippy lints on test-only CapabilityProbe struct

Add #[allow(clippy::struct_excessive_bools)] and
#[allow(clippy::items_after_statements)] to the capability inheritance
test struct that has 4 bool fields and is defined after init_test().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
